title: Sign up (Past Exam Review) AND Exam 3 Review
content:
Hello,

Professor Contreras will hold a review session on Sunday, November 9 from 11:00a - 2:00p in KOBL 100 (Base Classroom).

Please note the following:

1) If you want to study for Exam 3, there is no need to fill out the Doodle poll below. Just show up ready to study. 

   Note: If you cannot attend in person, please use the following link to join online: ZOOM LINK - EXAM 3 STUDY Links to an external site.

2) If you want to review a prior exam, you MUST fill out the Doodle poll below. 

DOODLE POLL - Prior Exam Review Links to an external site.

Best,

Professor Contreras
